ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "genomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "entrez_id" INTEGER /* Entrez ID associated with the genomic data */,
  "promoter" TEXT /* Promoter sequence */,
  "chr" TEXT /* Chromosome number */,
  "instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances of the promoter sequence */,
  "locations" TEXT /* Locations of the promoter sequence on the chromosome */,
  "strands" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the promoter sequence */,
  "fimo_p_values" REAL /* FIMO p-values for the promoter sequence */,
  "matching_sequences" TEXT /* Matching sequences */,
  "overlap_w_footprints" INTEGER /* Overlap with footprints in base pairs */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the genomic data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_entrez_id FOREIGN KEY ("entrez_id") REFERENCES entrez_data ("entrez_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_chr FOREIGN KEY ("chr") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chr_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "entrez_data" (
  "entrez_id" INTEGER /* Entrez ID */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene associated with the Entrez ID */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene associated with the Entrez ID */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species associated with the Entrez ID */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID associated with the Entrez ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entrez_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chr_number" TEXT /* Number of the chromosome */,
  "chr_description" TEXT /* Description of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promoter_sequences" (
  "promoter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promoter sequence */,
  "promoter_sequence" TEXT /* Promoter sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the promoter sequence */,
  "promoter_type" TEXT /* Type of promoter sequence (e.g., proximal, distal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promoter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression entry */,
  "entrez_id" INTEGER /* Entrez ID associated with the gene expression data */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue where the gene is expressed */,
  "experimental_condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition under which the gene expression was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_entrez_id FOREIGN KEY ("entrez_id") REFERENCES entrez_data ("entrez_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "genomic_id" INTEGER /* Genomic ID associated with the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_genomic_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomic_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("genomic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, annotator, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "genomic_id" INTEGER /* Genomic ID associated with the access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the access control entry */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_genomic_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomic_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("genomic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the log entry */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "genomic_id" INTEGER /* Genomic ID associated with the audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the audit entry */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the genomic data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the audit entry */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_genomic_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomic_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("genomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "validation_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "genomic_id" INTEGER /* Genomic ID associated with the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_genomic_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomic_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("genomic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "genomic_id" INTEGER /* Genomic ID associated with the constraint */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of constraint */,
  "constraint_value" TEXT /* Value of the constraint */,
  "constraint_description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraints_genomic_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomic_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("genomic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "genomic_id" INTEGER /* Genomic ID associated with the integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system being integrated with */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integrated system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_genomic_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomic_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("genomic_id")
)
